name: TWZRD Preflight
description: Trust gate for agent payments: blocks payment-shaped tool calls (MCP + exec/curl x402) when TWZRD preflight says the counterparty is not safe to pay. Shadow mode by default.

mode.description: off = disabled; shadow = evaluate + log would-blocks, never block; enforce = block on decision=block.

failMode.description: Behavior when the trust API is unreachable: open = allow the tool call, closed = block it (enforce mode only).

timeoutMs.description: Preflight HTTP timeout in ms. On timeout, failMode applies.

maxPriceUsdc.description: Local price ceiling in USDC. Payment calls above this are blocked (enforce) or logged (shadow) without calling the API.

denyWallets.description: Local denylist of seller wallet addresses. Always blocked in enforce mode, no API call.

allowWallets.description: Local allowlist of seller wallet addresses. Always allowed, no API call.

cacheTtlMs.description: TTL in ms for per-seller decision cache and 402 payTo origin cache.

matchers.description: Extra tool matchers extending coverage beyond the built-in AgentCash + exec rails. Matched in order; first match wins.

tool.description: Tool name or substring to match (case-insensitive).

walletParam.description: Param key whose value is the seller wallet (base58 Solana pubkey).

urlParam.description: Param key whose value is a URL; origin used as preflight resource_url.

priceParam.description: Param key for payment amount in USDC.

resourceParam.description: Param key for a human-readable resource name.
